description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the ocaml/opam2:ubuntu-lts Docker image for every job. Add four build jobs named ocaml403, ocaml404, ocaml:405 and ocaml:407, each executing the shell command `bash tools/ci-build.sh all <version>` with the respective OCaml versions 4.03, 4.04, 4.05 and 4.07. Add a pages job that runs `bash tools/ci-build.sh all 4.06 public`, publishes the `public/` directory as a GitLab Pages artifact, and is limited to the master branch. Add a testpages job in the test stage that runs `bash tools/ci-build.sh all 4.06 public-testing/` and stores the `public-testing/` directory as an artifact. No caches, services, or additional variables are defined.
